children.text: I am a student at Kunming Middle School, and there are many rules in my life.
children.keywords: student, Kunming Middle School, many rules

children.text: First of all, we must arrive at school on time because we can't be late for class.
children.keywords: first of all, on time, not late

children.text: We also have to wear the school uniform, which helps to build our school spirit.
Apart from these basic rules, we must follow other important rules in and out of class.
children.keywords: apart from, in and out of class

children.text: For example, we can't eat snacks in the classroom, nor can we use mobile phones.
children.keywords: for example, no snacks, nor, mobile phones

children.text: Whenever we want to ask the teacher a question, we should put up our hands first.
children.keywords: whenever, ask question, put up hand

children.text: Furthermore, we mustn't run in the hallways or litter, so that we can keep the school safe and tidy.
children.keywords: furthermore, not run, not litter, tidy

children.text: I know some rules are hard, but they are very important for us.
They not only help us to learn better but also make us become better people.
children.keywords: not only... but also, better people

children.text: As the saying goes, 'No rules, no order!' Let's try our best to follow them.
children.highlight: As the saying goes, No rules, no order
children.keywords: no rules, no order, follow them
